channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: From the Mexican border to Washington: A tiny Texas town fights Trump’s wall plan
item.description: A small Texas town is challenging the Trump administration’s border wall plans, arguing they could cause flooding and bypass legal processes.

item.title: Beaches closed and sandbags filled as Tropical Storm Bertha approaches the Gulf Coast
2 married couples from Honduras were among 5 adults who drowned in an Ohio river
